# Issue #8902 — Telegram Task Board Status Driver

## Scope

- Added an optional source-specific digest sink to `TaskSupervisorService`.
- Registered a Telegram sink that resolves orchestrator task origins back to the Telegram chat/thread and refreshes the pinned `/tasks` board.
- Covered fallback behavior when Telegram cannot resolve the room, so the supervisor can still use normal runtime delivery.
- Included minimal Biome import/format cleanups required by the rebased develop lint checks in touched validation paths.

## Validation

- `orchestrator-supervisor-test.log` — `bunx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/__tests__/task-supervisor.test.ts`
- `telegram-task-board-test.log` — `bunx vitest run src/task-board.test.ts src/task-board.mock-bot-api-scenario.test.ts`
- `mock-bot-api-scenario-report.json` — generated by the mock Bot API scenario test; records `sendMessage` → `pinChatMessage` → `editMessage` against one message id
- `orchestrator-typecheck.log` — `bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-agent-orchestrator typecheck`
- `telegram-build.log` — `bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-telegram build`
- `orchestrator-lint-check.log` — `bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-agent-orchestrator lint:check`
- `telegram-lint-check.log` — `bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-telegram lint:check`
- `app-core-lint.log` — `bun run --cwd packages/app-core lint`
- `git-diff-check.log` — `git diff --check HEAD`
- `root-verify.log` — `bun run verify` (passes the type-safety ratchet, then fails later on unrelated `@elizaos/plugin-blocker` lint formatting in `src/services/website-blocker/engine.test.ts`)

## N/A

- Android/device capture: connector/server-side task board routing only.
- Live Telegram Bot API capture: no bot token/chat fixture available in this environment; deterministic mocked Bot API tests prove the post-once/edit-on-status-change behavior.
